findings.thai: พ่อระวังเรื่องสุขภาพมาก
findings.reason: ระ (ra) is a low-class consonant with a short vowel and dead ending, so it has a high tone. ขะ (kha) is a high-class consonant with a short vowel and dead ending, so it has a low tone. มาก (maak) is a low-class consonant with a long vowel and dead ending, so it has a falling tone.
ก่อน (gon) has a mid-class initial consonant with a mai aek tone mark, so it has a low tone.

findings.thai: พักผ่อนน้อยเกินไป
findings.reason: ผ่อน (phon) has a high-class initial consonant with a mai aek tone mark, so it has a low tone. น้อย (noi) has a low-class initial consonant with a mai tho tone mark, so it has a high tone.

findings.thai: พักให้หายเหนื่อย
findings.reason: เหนื่อย (nueai) has a high-class leading consonant (ห) making the syllable follow high-class rules, and with a mai aek tone mark, it has a low tone.

findings.thai: พัฒนาได้เร็วขึ้น
findings.reason: ทะ (tha) is a low-class consonant with a short vowel and dead ending, so it has a high tone.

findings.thai: พิมพ์เอกสารผิดแล้วพิมพ์ใหม่
findings.romanization: phim eek-ga-saan phit laeo phim mai
findings.reason: เอก (eek) and กะ (ga) are mid-class consonants with dead endings, so they have low tones. ผิด (phit) is a high-class consonant with a dead ending, so it has a low tone. ใหม่ (mai) has a high-class leading consonant with a mai aek tone mark, so it has a low tone.

findings.thai: พูดเก่งเชียว
findings.reason: เก่ง (geng) has a mid-class initial consonant with a mai aek tone mark, so it has a low tone.
แทรก (saek) has a low-class initial consonant cluster (ทร pronounced as ซ) with a long vowel and dead ending, so it has a falling tone.
ไว้ (wai) has a low-class initial consonant with a mai tho tone mark, so it has a high tone.

findings.thai: เพลงที่เปิดเมื่อเช้า
findings.reason: เช้า (chao) has a low-class initial consonant with a mai tho tone mark, so it has a high tone.

findings.thai: เพียงกาแฟกับชาเท่านั้น

findings.reason: The current tones array is missing the tone for the final syllable นั้น (nan), which has a high tone.

findings.thai: เพียงคนในทีมเท่านั้น
findings.romanization: phiiang khon nai thiim thao nan

findings.reason: ครั้ง (khrang) has a low-class initial consonant with a mai tho tone mark, so it has a high tone. The current tones array is also missing the tone for the final syllable นั้น (nan), which has a high tone.
